conversation.text: omg hi so i just downloaded this app & i'm literally so bad with money like i have no idea what i'm spending on but i know it's bad. so like rent is coming up soon & i'm freaking out a little bit. also my cat might need to go to the vet soon which is gonna be expensive & i'm already anxious. can u like help me figure out what's going on??
This is just for me — so I can spot your rhythm and nudge in the moment. No bank link, nothing shared. What's roughly in your account?

ok so like i have 1423 right now?? maybe? i haven't checked in a few days bc i'm scared lol. rent is 950 split w my roommates so that's due like... next week? & then adobe is like 55 & insurance & phone & omg i'm doing the thing where i just list stuff aren't i. anyway the cat thing is stressing me out can we talk about that later

Got it — $1,423.00. 👍

Hmm, didn't catch a date. Try *"the 15th"*, *"May 1"* — or *"skip"* if your pay's irregular.
